summary: Iteration 48: Full System Cutover Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Verified all public-facing APIs, admin dashboard, chatbot, and catalog now read from catalog_products_col (enriched). 810 production-eligible products across 13 divisions confirmed.

issues: Shows '14 PRODUCT DIVISIONS' but API returns 13 divisions - minor text discrepancy

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full system cutover verified. All public routes (divisions, products, featured, product-by-slug, product families, brochure gate) use catalog_products_col. Admin stats show live/total/enriched counts from catalog. Chatbot stats/brands/products/skus all use catalog collections. Shadow collections completely removed except shadow_chunks_col (knowledge base fallback for chatbot). 810 live products, 13 divisions, 123 categories confirmed.

public_apis.GET /api/divisions: PASS - Returns 13 divisions from enriched catalog
public_apis.GET /api/products?search=hernia: PASS - Returns enriched catalog results with division_canonical
public_apis.GET /api/products/featured/homepage: PASS - Returns featured products with semantic_brand_system

chatbot_apis.GET /api/chatbot/brands: PASS - Returns brands from enriched catalog

ai_chat_api.POST /api/chat (hernia mesh): PASS - Returns enriched product context with products_referenced

admin_apis.GET /api/admin/products: PASS - Returns catalog products with semantic fields

data_consistency.division_count: PASS - 13 divisions consistent across all APIs

frontend_ui.catalog_index_page: PASS - Shows 'Product Catalog' title, 810 products, 13 divisions, search bar
frontend_ui.catalog_search_trauma: PASS - Shows 141 results with division tags, brands, materials
frontend_ui.product_detail_page: PASS - Shows enriched product with brand, division, category, specs, brochure
frontend_ui.homepage: PASS - Shows 810+ SKUs, search bar, featured products section
